mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM torikumi_result WHERE basho = #{basho} AND day = #{day} AND east_rikishi_id = #{eastRikishiId} AND west_rikishi_id = #{westRikishiId}
SELECT kimarite, COUNT(*) as count FROM torikumi_result WHERE winner_rikishi_id = #{rikishiId} AND kimarite IS NOT NULL AND kimarite != '' GROUP BY kimarite ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT t.opponent_id as "opponentId", r.shikona as "opponentShikona", r.heya as "opponentHeya", COUNT(CASE WHEN t.winner_rikishi_id = #{rikishiId} THEN 1 END) as "wins", COUNT(CASE WHEN t.winner_rikishi_id = t.opponent_id THEN 1 END) as "losses" FROM ( SELECT west_rikishi_id as opponent_id, winner_rikishi_id FROM torikumi_result WHERE east_rikishi_id = #{rikishiId} UNION ALL SELECT east_rikishi_id as opponent_id, winner_rikishi_id FROM torikumi_result WHERE west_rikishi_id = #{rikishiId} ) t JOIN rikishi r ON t.opponent_id = r.id GROUP BY t.opponent_id, r.shikona, r.heya ORDER BY "losses" DESC, "wins" ASC LIMIT 10
SELECT * FROM torikumi_result ORDER BY basho ASC, day ASC, id ASC

SELECT basho, day, CASE WHEN east_rikishi_id = #{rikishiId} THEN east_elo_before ELSE west_elo_before END as elo FROM torikumi_result WHERE east_rikishi_id = #{rikishiId} OR west_rikishi_id = #{rikishiId} ORDER BY basho ASC, day ASC, id ASC
